name: Safety Baton — Rechargeable LED Traffic Wand
shortDescription: Rechargeable LED traffic wand for directing vehicles in low light.
longDescription: A battery-operated, rechargeable LED baton for security staff and traffic marshals directing vehicles at night or in low-visibility conditions — green, red and flashing green-red modes give clear, unambiguous stop/go signals across a wider distance than a hand signal alone.

images.alt: Safety Baton — Rechargeable LED Traffic Wand supplied by Expert Safety Solutions, Vadodara
